DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALEXIS DAVIDSON OF THE MICHAEL LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 447-2833 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS OPULENT TEMPLE LLC AND SYD GRIS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled in its entirety. Plaintiff pled facts sufficient to support both causes of action against both defendants. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HK

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALEXIS DAVIDSON OF THE MICHAEL LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 447-2833 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS OPULENT TEMPLE LLC AND SYD GRIS' MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PUNATIVE DAMAGES IS Denied. Plaintiff has sufficiently alleged the required misconduct for an award of punitive damages. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HK
